description: Modify the 'simple_model_rocket.ork' design at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/simple_model_rocket.ork to meet three competition constraints: an apogee altitude between 130m and 170m, a ground hit velocity of 5.5 m/s or less, and a stability margin of at least 1.5 calibers. Save the updated design to the same file path and generate a summary report at /home/ga/Documents/exports/performance_envelope_report.txt comparing the initial and final configurations and performance metrics.
